items.title_en: Bank of America is set to report earnings. Here's what to expect
items.title_zh: 美国银行将公布收益。这是值得期待的
items.desc_en: Bank of America, the second-largest U.S. bank by assets, has topped expectations for earnings per share for 23 consecutive quarters.
items.desc_zh: 美国银行是美国资产第二大银行，其每股收益连续 23 个季度超出预期。

items.title_en: Google to punish sites that trap people in with back button tricks
items.title_zh: 谷歌将惩罚利用后退按钮欺骗用户的网站
items.desc_en: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，将从 6 月份开始惩罚屏蔽后退按钮导航的网站。

items.title_en: More than 200 Iranian sailors stranded after US torpedo attack return home
items.title_zh: 美军鱼雷袭击 200多名伊朗水手回国受困
items.desc_en: The survivors of the US attack on Iranian vessel Iris Dena, which claimed the lives of 104 people, were among those repatriated.
items.desc_zh: 美国袭击伊朗船只 Iris Dena 的事件造成 104 人死亡，此次袭击的幸存者也在被遣返的人员之列。

items.title_en: Walmart is refreshing the look of Great Value, its largest private label brand
items.title_zh: 沃尔玛正在更新其最大的自有品牌 Great Value 的面貌
items.desc_en: The nation's largest grocer is giving the brand a more modern and colorful spin as other retailers invest in private label.
items.desc_zh: 随着其他零售商投资自有品牌，这家美国最大的杂货商正在为该品牌赋予更现代、更丰富多彩的色彩。

items.title_en: Russia offers China energy lifeline as the Iran war strangles global supply
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争扼杀全球供应，俄罗斯为中国提供能源生命线
items.desc_en: "Russia can certainly fill the resource gap that has arisen in China," Russian foreign minister Sergei Lavrov said Wednesday.
items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯外交部长谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫周三表示：“俄罗斯当然可以填补中国出现的资源缺口。”

items.title_en: AI becomes contentious issue in midterms over donations
items.title_zh: 人工智能在中期选举中成为有争议的捐赠问题
items.desc_en: Five Congress members endorsed by a major AI PAC are under new pressure from a coalition of advocacy groups and nonprofits to denounce AI companies.
items.desc_zh: 由主要 AI PAC 认可的五名国会议员面临着来自倡导团体和非营利组织联盟的新压力，要求他们谴责人工智能公司。

items.title_en: Kenya fuel prices rise sharply despite reduction in tax due to Iran war
items.title_zh: 尽管因伊朗战争而减税，肯尼亚燃油价格仍大幅上涨
items.desc_en: Diesel prices rise by a record margin despite a reduction in value added tax.
items.desc_zh: 尽管增值税减少，柴油价格仍以创纪录的幅度上涨。

items.title_en: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
items.title_zh: 南非任命种族隔离时代政治家为新驻美国大使
items.desc_en: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.
items.desc_zh: 罗尔夫·迈耶在结束南非白人少数统治的谈判中作为谈判代表发挥了关键作用。

items.title_en: What a United-American merger would mean, from antitrust hurdles to airfare
items.title_zh: 从反垄断障碍到机票价格，美联航合并意味着什么
items.desc_en: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby reportedly floated a potential merger with Trump administration officials earlier this year.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，联合航空首席执行官斯科特·柯比今年早些时候曾与特朗普政府官员提出了合并的可能性。

items.title_en: 'Bit of pain' worth long-term security from Iran, Bessent tells BBC
items.title_zh: 贝森特告诉英国广播公司，“一点痛苦”值得伊朗长期保护
items.desc_en: US Treasury Secretary said a "small bit of economic pain" was worth it to eliminate the threat of Iranian strikes on Western capitals.
items.desc_zh: 美国财政部长表示，为了消除伊朗对西方首都发动袭击的威胁，“一点点经济痛苦”是值得的。

items.title_en: Palantir defends its record as MPs demand more scrutiny of data use
items.title_zh: Palantir 捍卫其记录，国会议员要求对数据使用进行更多审查
items.desc_en: NHS guidance that all hospitals should be using Palantir software from this month has sparked a backlash.
items.desc_zh: NHS 指导从本月起所有医院都应使用 Palantir 软件，此举引发了强烈反对。

items.title_en: Camp Mystic official testifies that he didn’t see flood warnings issued the day before storm hit - The Texas Tribune
items.title_zh: 神秘营官员作证说，他没有看到风暴袭击前一天发布的洪水警告 - 《德克萨斯论坛报》

items.desc_zh: 神秘营官员作证说，他没有看到暴风雨袭击前一天发布的洪水警告。《德克萨斯论坛报》神秘营负责人在因失踪女孩一事接受质询时崩溃了。

items.desc_zh: 警方称阿什莉·罗宾逊（Ashly Robinson，网名阿什莉·杰娜）在试图自杀后死亡。

items.title_en: Hamas rejects Gaza disarmament plan, Palestinian official says

items.desc_zh: 这位官员告诉英国广播公司，在以色列完全遵守其承诺之前，武装组织不会推进谈判。
